layer.name: Ladestandere

computedProperties.name: statusLabel
computedProperties.template: <% if (available_count > 0 || occupied_count > 0) { %><%= available_count %> ledig<%= available_count === 1 ? '' : 'e' %> · <%= occupied_count %> optaget<% if (out_of_service_count > 0) { %> · <%= out_of_service_count %> ude af drift<% } %><% } else { %>Status ukendt<% } %>

computedProperties.name: connectorList
computedProperties.template: <% var typeMap={'iec62196T2':'Type 2','chademo':'CHAdeMO','ccs1':'CCS1','ccs2':'CCS2','type1':'Type 1','iec62196T2Combo':'CCS2'}; if(connector_types && connector_types.length){ %><%= connector_types.map(function(t){return typeMap[t]||t}).join(', ') %><% } %>

layer.template_info:
<%= site_name %>
<%= address %>, <%= postal_code %> <%= city %>
<% if (operator_name) { %>
Operatør: <%= operator_name %>
<% } %>
<%= ac_count %> AC · <%= dc_count %> DC · max <%= max_power_kw %> kW
<% if (connectorList) { %>
Stik: <%= connectorList %>
<% } %>
<%= statusLabel %>
<%= evse_count %> ladepunkter i alt
<% if (last_seen_at) { %>
Opdateret: <%= last_seen_at %>
<% } %>
